source: RCA-13 Foxy/RAG safety and streaming readiness inventory

artifacts.readinessRole: Pins the live grounded-path P12 backstop: unsafe grounded text returns safe-abstain, refunds quota, avoids text telemetry, and does not persist unsafe content.
evidence: serves the safe-abstain envelope and refunds when the grounded answer is hard-blocked

artifacts.readinessRole: Pins FOX-7: unsafe legacy intent-router fallback text is screened before persistence/response, becomes the safe hard-abstain envelope, refunds quota, and never writes unsafe content to foxy_chat_messages.
evidence: serves safe-abstain and does not persist unsafe text from the legacy fallback path

artifacts.readinessRole: Pins the SSE frame/event contract, quota policy, session frame, and non-SSE graceful degradation for the streaming path.
evidence: Foxy streaming pipeline — Phase 1.1 contract tests.
the route prepends a `session` event with sessionId before upstream events

artifacts.readinessRole: Pins the streaming first-paint backstop: student-visible text/done SSE frames are withheld until the complete answer passes output screening, so unsafe text becomes a hard-abstain without ever appearing on the wire.
evidence: does not send unsafe text deltas before final output screening can hard-abstain

artifacts.readinessRole: Pins Hindi/Devanagari and Hinglish abusive-token coverage in the student-facing output screen while preserving legitimate Hindi curriculum text.
Pins JSON fallback behavior so hard-abstain responses route to abstain UI instead of an empty successful bubble.
evidence: Foxy streaming JSON-fallback abstain — P0 regression test.
hard-abstain JSON payload calls onAbstain and NOT onDone
uses Hindi copy when language is hi

artifacts.readinessRole: Pins key grounded-answer threshold constants between the Next.js package and Deno Edge Function config.
evidence: grounding-config parity between Next.js and Deno

artifacts.readinessRole: Records Cycle-4 landed scope and the historical follow-up trail; current open follow-ups are tracked in remainingFollowUps.
Records the backlog disposition: Foxy AI/RAG is done for landed P12 backstop and OpenAI shadow governance, with the historical follow-up trail preserved.
